name: Indonesian Grilled Chicken with Green Onionyogurt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken breasts in the Ineonesian Marinade for at least 1 hour.
2. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
3. Grill the marinated chicken breasts for 5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through and reaching an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
4. Remove the chicken from the grill and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing.
5. Serve the grilled chicken slices with Green Onion Yogurt Sauce.
Yield: 4 servings
